creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 191804
py-gfm.shar

Hello,

attached is the shar file for py-gfm, an implementation of GitHub-Flavored Markdown written as an extension to the Python Markdown library. It aims for maximal compatibility with GitHub's rendering.

I used the GH repository instead of Cheese Shop because the latter one does not have license info and documentation.

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.1-RELEASE amd64 + i386) for each py27 + py36 flavor -> OK
- portlint -> OK

--
Cheers
Kai
